chunks.text: The page at http://www.eecs.berkeley.edu/Research/Projects/ was not found on the EECS website. The site apologizes for this error and provides links to frequently requested information, including graduate programs (M.Eng./M.S./Ph.D.) and admissions, undergraduate programs (B.A./B.S.) and admissions, student recruitment and job postings, computer or network support, and contact information for someone in EECS. For further assistance, users are directed to contact webteam@eecs.berkeley.edu.
